title: feat: add db integration scope gate
goal: Prepare the owner-approved DB integration scope gate for v1.1.6 before any real DB driver, real DB connection, package change, live DB integration test, migration execution, provider SDK apply, or production deployment.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop if this PR adds a DB driver, real DB connection, package or lockfile change, migration execution, provider SDK apply, production deployment, readiness claim, secret value, or quality-gate weakening.
doneCriteria: DB integration scope gate validator exists
owner approval schema rejects missing owner fields
DB driver/package change requires explicit future driver package
real DB connection requires secret manager scope
live DB integration tests require real DB connection approval
runtime, production, legal, and YouTube policy readiness claims remain forbidden
unsafe secrets, private URLs, wallet addresses, raw provider responses, raw DB connection strings, token-like values, and raw GitHub log references are rejected
docs and .codex evidence record safe defaults

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds an internal DB integration scope gate validator and tests without DB driver, real DB connection, migrations, provider SDK, public API, contract ABI, YouTube connector, Chain Listener, or IRIS delivery changes.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this PR adds planning gates, schema, docs, and tests only.

reviewScope.scope: DB integration scope gate validator, tests, docs, owner approval schema, checklist, and machine-readable evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is accidentally expanding into real DB/package/migration/provider execution before owner approval.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Vitest coverage, typecheck, evidence CI, quality self-protection, secret scan, no-scraping scan, DB driver import scan, and GitHub checks.

bestOfN.selectedCandidate: typed DB integration scope gate with owner approval schema and safe defaults
bestOfN.reasonSelected: It gives enforceable v1.1.6 preparation without adding DB driver dependencies, package changes, real DB connections, migration execution, provider SDK apply, production deployment, or readiness claims.

testCoverageEvidence.changedArea: apps/api/src/db-integration-scope-gate.ts and DB integration scope gate evidence docs
testCoverageEvidence.testCommand: corepack pnpm test; npm test; corepack pnpm vitest run apps/api/src/db-integration-scope-gate.test.ts
testCoverageEvidence.whatTheTestCovers: Default not-approved state, owner approval field requirements, project-owner role, DB driver/package gate, real DB connection gate, live DB integration gate, migration rollback requirement, forbidden provider/production/readiness claims, and unsafe evidence rejection.
testCoverageEvidence.edgeCases: Missing owner approval fields, wrong owner role, package flag without driver package, real DB without secret manager scope, live DB without real DB approval, migration apply without rollback plan, unsafe connection strings, private URLs, wallet addresses, token-like values, raw provider responses, and raw GitHub log references.
